results.rendered_html:
sam-√bhram P. bhramati, or -bhrāmyati, to roam or wander all about, go quite astray,  Kathās. ;
to be greatly confused, be perplexed or puzzled,  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.:
Caus. -bhrāmayati, to lead astray, perplex, bewilder &c.: (only in) Pass. -bhrāmyate, to be perplexed about, despair of (abl.),  MBh.
